출애굽기 34:1.content: Yahweh said to Moses, “Chisel two stone tablets like the first. I will write on the tablets the words that were on the first tablets, which you broke.

출애굽기 34:2.content: Be ready by the morning, and come up in the morning to Mount Sinai, and present yourself there to me on the top of the mountain.

출애굽기 34:3.content: No one shall come up with you or be seen anywhere on the mountain. Do not let the flocks or herds graze in front of that mountain.”

출애굽기 34:4.content: He chiseled two tablets of stone like the first; then Moses rose up early in the morning, and went up to Mount Sinai, as Yahweh had commanded him, and took in his hand two stone tablets.

출애굽기 34:5.content: Yahweh descended in the cloud, and stood with him there, and proclaimed Yahweh’s name.

출애굽기 34:6.content: Yahweh passed by before him, and proclaimed, “Yahweh! Yahweh, a merciful and gracious God, slow to anger, and abundant in loving kindness and truth,

출애굽기 34:7.content: keeping loving kindness for thousands, forgiving iniquity and disobedience and sin; and who will by no means clear the guilty, visiting the iniquity of the fathers on the children, and on the children’s children, on the third and on the fourth generation.”

출애굽기 34:8.content: Moses hurried and bowed his head toward the earth, and worshiped.

출애굽기 34:9.content: He said, “If now I have found favor in your sight, Lord, please let the Lord go among us, even though this is a stiff-necked people; pardon our iniquity and our sin, and take us for your inheritance.”

출애굽기 34:10.content: He said, “Behold, I make a covenant: before all your people I will do marvels, such as have not been worked in all the earth, nor in any nation; and all the people among whom you are shall see the work of Yahweh; for it is an awesome thing that I do with you.

출애굽기 34:11.content: Observe that which I command you today. Behold, I will drive out before you the Amorite, the Canaanite, the Hittite, the Perizzite, the Hivite, and the Jebusite.

출애굽기 34:12.content: Be careful, lest you make a covenant with the inhabitants of the land where you are going, lest it be for a snare among you;

출애굽기 34:13.content: but you shall break down their altars, and dash in pieces their pillars, and you shall cut down their Asherah poles;

출애굽기 34:14.content: for you shall worship no other god; for Yahweh, whose name is Jealous, is a jealous God.

출애굽기 34:15.content: “Don’t make a covenant with the inhabitants of the land, lest they play the prostitute after their gods, and sacrifice to their gods, and one call you and you eat of his sacrifice;

출애굽기 34:16.content: and you take of their daughters to your sons, and their daughters play the prostitute after their gods, and make your sons play the prostitute after their gods.

출애굽기 34:17.content: “You shall make no cast idols for yourselves.

출애굽기 34:18.content: “You shall keep the feast of unleavened bread. Seven days you shall eat unleavened bread, as I commanded you, at the time appointed in the month Abib; for in the month Abib you came out of Egypt.

출애굽기 34:19.content: “All that opens the womb is mine; and all your livestock that is male, the firstborn of cow and sheep.

출애굽기 34:20.content: You shall redeem the firstborn of a donkey with a lamb. If you will not redeem it, then you shall break its neck. You shall redeem all the firstborn of your sons. No one shall appear before me empty.

출애굽기 34:21.content: “Six days you shall work, but on the seventh day you shall rest: in plowing time and in harvest you shall rest.

출애굽기 34:22.content: “You shall observe the feast of weeks with the first fruits of wheat harvest, and the feast of harvest at the year’s end.

출애굽기 34:23.content: Three times in the year all your males shall appear before the Lord Yahweh, the God of Israel.

출애굽기 34:24.content: For I will drive out nations before you and enlarge your borders; neither shall any man desire your land when you go up to appear before Yahweh, your God, three times in the year.

출애굽기 34:25.content: “You shall not offer the blood of my sacrifice with leavened bread. The sacrifice of the feast of the Passover shall not be left to the morning.

출애굽기 34:26.content: “You shall bring the first of the first fruits of your ground to the house of Yahweh your God. “You shall not boil a young goat in its mother’s milk.”

출애굽기 34:27.content: Yahweh said to Moses, “Write these words; for in accordance with these words I have made a covenant with you and with Israel.”

출애굽기 34:28.content: He was there with Yahweh forty days and forty nights; he neither ate bread, nor drank water. He wrote on the tablets the words of the covenant, the ten commandments.

출애굽기 34:29.content: When Moses came down from Mount Sinai with the two tablets of the covenant in Moses’ hand, when he came down from the mountain, Moses didn’t know that the skin of his face shone by reason of his speaking with him.

출애굽기 34:30.content: When Aaron and all the children of Israel saw Moses, behold, the skin of his face shone; and they were afraid to come near him.

출애굽기 34:31.content: Moses called to them, and Aaron and all the rulers of the congregation returned to him; and Moses spoke to them.

출애굽기 34:32.content: Afterward all the children of Israel came near, and he gave them all the commandments that Yahweh had spoken with him on Mount Sinai.

출애굽기 34:33.content: When Moses was done speaking with them, he put a veil on his face.

출애굽기 34:34.content: But when Moses went in before Yahweh to speak with him, he took the veil off, until he came out; and he came out, and spoke to the children of Israel that which he was commanded.

출애굽기 34:35.content: The children of Israel saw Moses’ face, that the skin of Moses’ face shone; so Moses put the veil on his face again, until he went in to speak with him.
